title: Oracle Historical AWR Forensics
description: Post-incident analysis using AWR snapshots to reconstruct performance events
author: A. Simmons

awr_snapshot_finder.description: Locate AWR snapshot bracket for the requested time window

interactive_hints.awr_wait_delta: Run to see which wait events dominated during the incident window — this is the primary diagnostic step for historical forensics
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with results gathered so far

awr_wait_delta.description: Wait event delta between AWR snapshot brackets

interactive_hints.awr_sql_delta: Run to identify which specific SQL statements drove the dominant wait events — essential for pinpointing the root cause application module
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here if wait events alone are sufficient for your diagnosis

awr_sql_delta.description: Top SQL by elapsed time delta between AWR snapshots

interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with results gathered so far
